title: Elastic N.V (ESTC) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: Analyst Price Targets and Ratings for ESTC: Wall Street analysts have a median price target of $106.50, with the highest price target at $119.00 and the lowest at $75.00. The average price target across 22 Wall Street analysts is $102.36, ranging from $75.00 to $130.00. According to 23 analysts, ESTC has a Buy consensus rating, with 35% recommending Strong Buy, 39% recommending Buy, and 26% suggesting Hold. Fair Value Estimates: Morningstar estimates a fair value of $54.00. One analysis suggests an implied fair value of $99.63 per share, almost double the recent closing price. Another estimate puts fair value at $107.96. Valuation Metrics: Based on a Price/Earnings ratio of 19.49, ESTC's valuation is described as rather expensive, while the Price/Forward Earnings ratio of 16.38 indicates the stock is valued correctly. ChartMill assigns a valuation rating of 5/10, which can be considered as Fairly Valued. Growth Outlook: ESTC is expected to show quite strong growth in revenue, with expected yearly growth of 12.99% in the coming years. Analyst Consensus: The consensus view remains constructive on ESTC, with the majority of analysts rating the stock as a Buy despite recent stock price weakness.
